S1_avatar.notes: Good yearbook portrait with laser backdrop. Zip-up gray sweater, close-up framing. Slightly more serious expression than typical yearbook smile. Good face likeness but tighter crop reduces the yearbook-page feel.

S2_edit.notes: Medium-wash denim jacket replacement successful. Background preserved well. Functional edit but jacket appears slightly lighter and less detailed than Skill 1. Overall competent local edit.

S3_poster.notes: Bold gold/black design. All core text correct. Location text wraps to 2 lines (Room 202 on second line). Grand piano at bottom adds nice touch. Very dramatic typography. 9:16 vertical format rather than 3:4.

S4_character.notes: Good armor design with purple veins, energy sword and shield. Empire State building visible. Rainy atmosphere. However landscape orientation instead of portrait (didn't follow 3:4), low-angle effect not as dramatic as Skill 1/3.

method: Objective-First template (Goal → Subject → Style → Text → Keep), Edit pattern (Change/Keep/Avoid)
